title: Paepalanthus schlechteri
taxonomy: Paepalanthus schlechteri is classified within the family Eriocaulaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pipeworts. This family is part of the order Poales, a large and diverse group of monocots. The order Poales includes various families such as Poaceae, Joinvilleaceae, and Xyridaceae, among others.
